Waypoint.name: Pool
Waypoint.Statement: I enjoy this pool, but I must go meet Salida.

Waypoint.name: Garden
Waypoint.Question: Are you ready for the cermnony.
Waypoint.Response: (pausing to observe my surroundings) Ah, yes... the garden. It's quite beautiful today, isn't it? (pausing again) I'm not sure what this ceremony is about, but I'll do my best to participate. (taking a deep breath) I feel a sense of calmness, a feeling of being present in the moment. The sounds around me - birds chirping, leaves rustling - they all seem to blend together in harmony. (pausing once more) I'm not sure what emotions I should be experiencing right now, but for now, I'll just focus on being here.
